titleStmt.title: SII 25.3: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 3. (A.R. No. 3 of 1908.) CUMBUM, CUMBUM TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Another slab in the same choultry.
This inscription is dated in Śaka •••••, Chaitra, śu 2, Monday which details are insufficient for verification.

This record does not give the name of the king. Palaeographically it may be assigned to the 15th-16th century. It records the provision of grains and pepper for worship and food-offerings to god Vīrabhadradēva by the merchant guild Ubhaya-nānādēśa Ayyāvo[ḷe] •• mūlamukhyamainasamasta-pekkaṁḍru and their group when they meet at the mukha-maṇḍapa of the temple of Vīrabhadradēva at Maṭṭipeṁṭa. The grant is stated to have been made by Pāṁmayyaṁgāru, son of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara aṁtyaṁbaragaṁḍa Vallabhayyadēva-mahārāju at the request of Suṁkaṁ Mallana-pekkaṁḍru. Pekkaṁḍru Mallana is stated to have issued this.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrī
ya namaḥ . svastiśrī sakala śakavaruṣaṁbula
saṁvvatsara cayi ta śu 2 sō svasti samasta nijanāmā
layina śrīgaṇēśvaradēvara gavurīśvaradēvara divyaśrīpā
yina naṁdikanuma naḍaci Akhila vubhaya nānādēśa Āyyāvo
mūla mukhyamayina samasta pekkaṁḍr¤uṁnnu vīrapparivāramuṁnu
pēṁṭṭa vīrabhad¤radēvara mukhamaṁḍapamunaṁdu vaj¤ra śiṁhyāsanā rūḍhu
layi kū¨rcuṁḍi maṭṭipeṁṭa vīrabhadradēvaraku yiṁccina dha¨rṁmma śāsana vīra
bha dadēvaraku Amru tapaḍikiṁnni Aṁgaraṁga vayibhavālakuṁnnu sāgiṁcina
vivaraṁ naṁdikanuma naḍaci nānādhāṁnyāla pati yeddu peṟuka 1ki A kā
sulekhānu dūdi malana poṁkala peruka miriyāla perukalu vīniki
patiperuka 1ki kāsu lēkhānu Ācaṁdā¨rkka sthāyigānu yistimi gāna
yīdhaṁ¨rmmānaku yevvaru ginaka tappinānu gaṁgakaratasu gōvu jaṁppina pāpā
na povvāru pedda koḍukunu caṁppina pāpāna povvāru svadattā dviguṇaṁ pu
ṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ . paradattā pahārēṇa svadattuṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēttu . maṁgaḷaṁ
mahā śrīśrīśrīśrīśrī śrī manmahāmaṁḍalēśvara Aṁtyaṁbaragaṁḍa vallabhayyadēva ma
hārājula kumāruṁḍu pānimayyaṁgāri Ānatini suṁkaṁ mallana pekkaṁ
ḍrunu daṁḍaṁ nedi vinnapaṁ pāliṁci yicina dha¨rmaśā
sanamu .
Digital edition of SII 25.3 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
